launch_inputs.issue_summary: Enterprise CSV exports stall at exactly sixty seconds when an account requests more than fifty thousand rows from the audit export screen.
launch_inputs.reproduction_context: Observed on the current release candidate using the seeded product workspace. Two customer-facing support tickets cite timeout banners while the job keeps consuming worker capacity in the background.
launch_inputs.acceptance_scope: Isolate the root cause, propose or implement the smallest safe fix, and provide regression guidance for export jobs, retries, and queue pressure.

launch_inputs.issue_summary: A high-value enterprise account is blocked by audit exports that hang at sixty seconds whenever the selection exceeds one quarter of a quarter's worth of events.
launch_inputs.reproduction_context: Customer success can reproduce it from the account timeline and the seeded repo contains the current export worker implementation plus the latest incident summary.
launch_inputs.acceptance_scope: Deliver an implementation-ready fix recommendation and a review packet that can be explicitly approved before the change is launched.
